<!-- Thanks for contributing to portico-core -->

## Summary

<!-- What changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`node test_*.mjs` + `node assistant/test_*.mjs`).
- [ ] If I touched the solver, I validated it against an analytical case or global equilibrium (ΣReactions = ΣLoads), `test_*.mjs` pattern.
- [ ] If I changed JS/CSS, I bumped the `?v=` cache version across **all** files at once (see CONTRIBUTING).
- [ ] Code comments in English; UI strings in Spanish with their i18n (EN) entry where applicable.
- [ ] No institutional branding, no `excel/`, `referencias/` or `node_modules/` files.
